title: Aliveness as Participation — Processing Modes Update (ICON / AGENCY / RITUAL)
content_html:
Aliveness as Participation — Processing Modes Update

Generated: 2025-09-21 16:36:42 BST · Europe/London

Original Instruction

2025-09-21 16:36:42 BST

— “Update the Processing scaffold to include MODE presets (ICON/AGENCY/RITUAL) and ritual activation logic.”

What changed (v2)

  • MODE string (ICON, AGENCY, RITUAL)
  • RitualSequence: k-clicks-in-window activation; SourceImage.active
  • ICON: single-source dominance + applyHalo presence effect
  • AGENCY: random “rebel” intervention forces neglected layer to dominate
  • RITUAL: layers render only after activation; batch can auto-activate
  • Batch-first; set RUN_INTERACTIVE=true to test ritual clicks

How to use

  1. Open the folder in Processing (Java).
  2. Drop test images into data/sources; list in data/manifest.csv.
  3. Pick a MODE in AliveProcessingSketch_v2.pde, run, and check /output.

Citations

Gell, A. (1998). Art and Agency — artworks as social agents. OUP
Belting, H. (1990). Likeness and Presence — images as presences in Christianity. UChicago
Australian Museum — Dreaming (Aboriginal cosmologies). AM
The Met — Art of the Mask in Africa. Met

This update complements your “aliveness” phenom/relational modules.
